heading: Records and inspection
label: 170108 Records and inspection
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17010836:1161., , .Aug. 11, 1971Pub. L. 92–93, § 1185 Stat. 318In this section, the word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.In subsection (a)(3), the words “registered office or” are omitted for consistency in the revised title.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17010836:1161., , .Aug. 11, 1971Pub. L. 92–93, § 1185 Stat. 318In this section, the word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.In subsection (a)(3), the words “registered office or” are omitted for consistency in the revised title.

children.text: correct and complete records of account;
minutes of the proceedings of its members, executive committee, and committees having any of the authority of its executive committee; and
at its principal office, a record of the names and addresses of its members entitled to vote.

children.heading: .—Inspection
children.label: b .—Inspection
children.text: A member entitled to vote, or an agent or attorney of the member, may inspect the records of the corporation for any proper purpose, at any reasonable time.
